title: Flaged Outlook emails and use of tasks
excerpt:
Does Monday.com support sync of flaged emails from Outlook? 
What about tasks (todo)created in Outlook? So far it seems I have to make tasks done in Monday as well as make them complete in Outlook. So sync?

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does Monday.com support sync of flaged emails from Outlook?
What about tasks (todo)created in Outlook? So far it seems I have to make tasks done in Monday as well as make them complete in Outlook. So sync?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Pierce007 Currently, I believe monday does not offer native support for syncing flagged emails or tasks from Outlook. This means that actions such as flagging an email or marking a task as complete in Outlook won’t automatically reflect in monday, and vice versa.

However, researching online there may be third-party solutions that can bridge this gap:

  1. Microsoft Power Automate: By setting up custom flows, you can automate the creation of items in monday.com when an email is flagged in Outlook. This approach requires a Power Automate subscription and some configuration.

Monday Community

  1. zzBots Integration: zzBots offers a 2-way sync between Microsoft To Do and monday.com, ensuring tasks remain updated across both platforms. This can help in keeping your tasks synchronized without manual intervention.

Monday Community

I haven’t come across using these personally so perhaps others can share there experiance too

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks - just what I thought.
would rather use Monday than 3. parties.
